record.field:
Your town, your history: help us name our newest street!

Dear Residents,

Following our latest City Council meeting held on May 12th, we are officially breaking ground on the new residential development located adjacent to the Municipal Sports Field. As this area will soon welcome new families and neighbors, the Council believes the name of this street should reflect the spirit of the people who live here.

Consistent with our commitment to collaborative governance, we want to hear your preference. This is your opportunity to leave a lasting mark on our town’s map. Thank you for your continued engagement in making our community a better place to live.

Thank you in advance, your devoted City Hall team.

Your voice has been heard!

Thank you for participating in this naming survey. Your suggestions and votes will be compiled and presented during the "final review" session of the City Council next month.

The city council don't just build streets; we build community. We will announce the winning name via the Citizen Portal and our City Blog once the official decree is signed.

Stay tuned for more updates on the sports field expansion project!
